Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPKIDSA ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform KIDS Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. Q ; ;--------- Private Methods used only by DIGITAL HEALTH PLATFORM ---------- GTKIDS(SOURCE,TARGET) ;enum packages N ERR,X,PATTERN S ERR="",X="PATTERN" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) ; Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; POSTKID(SOURCE,TARGET) ;enum packages N ERR,X,PATTERN,PKGNAME,DATA,PKG,PKGDATA M ^TMP("STEF")=SOURCE S ERR="" S X="PKGNAME" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) ;Check if packageName is empty I PKGNAME="" D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"Missing packageName parameter","POSTKID^DVPKIDSA") Q DVPERR ;Check if package has been passed I '$D(@SOURCE@("DVPESSO")) D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"Missing package file","POSTKID^DVPKIDSA") Q DVPERR ;SAVE FILE D OPEN^%ZISH("HANDLE1","/tmp","kid"_$J_".KID","W") I POP D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"Couldn't open the temp file","POSTKID^DVPKIDSA") Q DVPERR U IO S TMP=$G(@SOURCE@("DVPESSO",7)) ;M ^STEF(1)=@SOURCE@("DVPESSO") S TMP=$E(TMP,$F(TMP,"K"),99999) W TMP ;continue writing the file S X=7 F S X=$O(@SOURCE@("DVPESSO",X)) Q:X="" D . W $G(@SOURCE@("DVPESSO",X)) D CLOSE^%ZISH("HANDLE1") ; S RET=$$LOADKIDS^DVPKIDS1("/tmp/kidtext2.KID") S PKG("STATUS")=RET M @TARGET@("results")=PKG Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; GTKIDINF(SOURCE,TARGET) ;package information N ERR,X,PKGNAME,PKG,RSLT,CNT,U S U="^",ERR="",X="PKGNAME" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) ;Check if packageName is empty I PKGNAME="" D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"Missing packageName parameter","GTKIDINF^DVPKIDSA") Q DVPERR ;and if it exists S X=$$INSTALDT^XPDUTL(PKGNAME,.RSLT) I X=0 D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"No package found matching name: "_PKGNAME,"GTKIDINF^DVPKIDSA") Q DVPERR ;get history S PKG("name")=PKGNAME S CNT=1,RET="" F S RET=$O(RSLT(RET)) Q:RET="" D . S PKG("history",CNT)=$$FMTE^XLFDT(RET),CNT=CNT+1 M @TARGET@("results","package")=PKG Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL()
